description: Volatile curse brewer who overlaps waves, mines, and smoky ritual pressure.

presentation.headline: Curse brewer who turns ritual tools into unstable area pressure.
presentation.fantasy_hook: Oversized goggles, clattering vials, and a smoking censer make the alchemist readable before the first hex detonates.
presentation.identity_summary: The Hex Alchemist curates a hybrid ritual arsenal built around waves, mines, bells, and cursed magic. Kills stir the current mixture, briefly increasing both casting tempo and damage.
presentation.passive_summary: Enemy kills briefly grant attack speed and damage, stacking up to three times while the mixture remains unstable.
